forbidden_scope: Formal product CLI, SDK/MCP full entrypoints, generated clients, or App integration
History list/search/filtering, database/ORM/migration tooling, multi-backend abstraction, hosted service storage, or result store
Browser/runtime executor, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence retrieval, live sessions, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes
True-write behavior, write operation execution, write reconciliation, complex retry/recovery, or generic browser agent loops

integration_evidence.summary: Seeds the GH-108 golden read-only Run Record fixture, queries Core projections through a repo-local CLI mode, queries the same projections through API Server routes, and asserts the outputs match.
Adds root and package smoke scripts for the minimal API/CLI smoke without introducing a formal CLI product package.
Exposes generated TypeScript declarations so the smoke can consume the existing API Server workspace package.
Documents the smoke command, query route boundary, and non-product-CLI scope.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Repo-local API/CLI smoke over already-established query contracts and the GH-108 golden fixture without new protocol fields, formal CLI product, App integration, storage backends, raw evidence retrieval, or write behavior.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0003/0005/0007/0008, GH-106/GH-107 query surfaces, GH-108 golden fixture, smoke output, GH-109 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when write guardrails, formal CLI/SDK/MCP entrypoints, App UI, generated clients, API submission, database storage, hosted service storage, real execution, or true-write behavior are added.

commands.note: Validated API/CLI smoke against golden run run_fixture_success_001.
Root smoke command validated API/CLI smoke against golden run run_fixture_success_001.
Validated conformance fixtures with 4 schemas, 6 fixtures, and 4 Run Records.
Validated workspace self-checks, including schemas, Core, API Server, and conformance.
Validated conformance fixtures with 4 schemas, 6 fixtures, and 4 Run Records.
Installed surface diagnostics passed; CLI version freshness was advisory stale but non-blocking.
Fact chain resolved to GH-109 after progress Evidence Freshness was normalized to `current`.
Evidence map has present behavior, test, and fresh verification evidence.

Consumer repo has no tools/ directory; tools/skills_surface.py check, tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only, tools/check_release_surface.py, tools/version_surface_check.py, and tools/check_npm_package.py are absent.

remaining_risks: GH-109 intentionally does not add write-side guardrails, formal CLI product, App UI, SDK/MCP entrypoints, raw evidence retrieval, or true writes; GH-110 owns the remaining write-side guardrail surface for FR #96.
